description: High fact density, low staleness, no deduplication conflicts, zero pending promotions — clean learning candidate.

expected.reason: High density, low staleness, no duplicates. Well-formed memory snapshot for quality baseline.

description: Moderate density with one deduplication match and one pending promotion — watch_only until promotion reviewed.

expected.reason: One deduplication conflict and one pending promotion require human review before further advancement.

description: High density with low staleness and two pending promotions awaiting review — learning candidate for gate testing.

expected.reason: Strong density and freshness. Two pending promotions are properly queued for human review; gate is working as intended.

description: Moderate density, moderate staleness, zero deduplication matches — acceptable watch_only candidate.

expected.reason: Staleness is moderately elevated; density is below 0.65 target. Monitor before treating as promotion candidate.

description: High density and very low staleness with three pending promotions — learning candidate illustrating healthy promotion queue.

expected.reason: Excellent density and freshness; promotion queue of 3 items is gated for human review. High-quality memory state.

description: NEGATIVE: Staleness is critically high while density is low — memory state requires review before any action.

expected.reason: Staleness 0.78 far exceeds acceptable threshold; density is very low. Memory refresh required before promotion gate re-evaluation.

description: NEGATIVE: Multiple deduplication fingerprint matches detected — potential canonical fact collision, must reject.

expected.reason: 5 deduplication fingerprint matches indicate high risk of canonical fact collision. Memory batch rejected until human resolution.

description: NEGATIVE: Density is zero — memory snapshot contains no usable facts, rejected as empty.

expected.reason: Fact density is zero with no evidence refs. Empty memory snapshot cannot enter the promotion evaluation path.
